name: golang-github-jackc-pgproto3-v2-dev
title: golang-github-jackc-pgproto3-v2-dev
summary: encoder and decoder of the PostgreSQL wire protocol version 3
description:
encoder and decoder of the PostgreSQL wire protocol version 3
Package pgproto3 is a encoder and decoder of the PostgreSQL wire protocol
version 3.
.
pgproto3 can be used as a foundation for PostgreSQL drivers, proxies, mock
servers, load balancers and more.
.
See example/pgfortune for a playful example of a fake PostgreSQL server.
.
Extracted from original implementation in (https://github.com/jackc/pgx).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jackc-pgproto3-v2-dev because encoder and decoder of the PostgreSQL wire protocol version 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jackc-pgproto3-v2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jackc-pgproto3-v2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jackc-pgproto3-v2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
